def suitable_for_marketing(self) -> bool:
        if (self.gender in [Gender.MALE, Gender.FEMALE, Gender.TRANSGENDER] and
                self.age in [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46] and
                self.employment_status in [EmploymentStatus.EMPLOYED, EmploymentStatus.STUDENT] and
                self.education in [Education.COLLEGE, Education.BACHELOR, Education.MASTER] and
                self.major == Major.MARKETING and
                self.creativity == Creativity.VERY_HIGH):
            return True
        else:
            return False
